name: speech_to_text
description: Transcribe audio to text. provider='elevenlabs' adds speaker diarization (up to 32 speakers), word timestamps, and audio-event tags — ideal for meetings, calls, and interviews. Supports wav, mp3, m4a, ogg, flac, webm.

provider.description: Transcription provider. 'elevenlabs' enables diarization. Omit to use the configured default.

diarize.description: ElevenLabs only: label who said what (up to 32 speakers). Returns a speaker-attributed transcript.

mint.description: Save the transcript to the BlackBox as a searchable, speaker-attributed snapshot (uses the current operator). Great for meetings and calls you want to recall later.
